channel.title: WETH on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in WETH on Tech Tracker

item.title: How To Use Matic Wallet To Send Ethereum At Very Low Gas Fees.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-MvWldwd9y4M/YOirwljoKOI/AAAAAAAAFuc/A6UB2ytQbUUNOu4QmG8zcI-xbilSzOniQCLcBGAsYHQ/w400-h225/1625861054181111-0.png" alt="Polygon Matic Wallet V2 Bridge" title="Polygon Matic Wallet V2 Bridge"> Ethereum is right now the most popular & best crypto currency alternative to bitcoin but Ethereum have very high transactions fee due to scalability issues the ethereum developer didn’t think about scalability as he never expected Ethereum huge growth in just few years as today ETH - Ethereum become big competitor to Bitcoin which is king sized success.
